fixes.description: T010 ARF8 single KO: gm on ARF6 composite from 0.8 to 0.5
fixes.reason: Iter 2 gm=0.8 left ratio 0.9566, just above 0.95 threshold. Tightening to 0.5 crosses threshold for correct decreased prediction.
fixes.biological_justification: Though ARF8 is secondary to ARF7, its loss produces a measurable hypocotyl effect (Reed 2018). gm=0.5 treats the single paralog loss as equivalent to ~50% family activity loss when mapped onto the ARF6 composite, matching observed phenotype magnitude.

fixes_attempted_and_reverted.description: Added PIF7 -> Hypocotyl_Length (+1) direct edge (Chung 2020 DOI: 10.1038/s41477-020-0633-3) to address T099 PIF7 phospho-dead sub-threshold failure
fixes_attempted_and_reverted.outcome: Fixed T099 but broke T053 (phyB KO + red), T074 (phyB Pfr OE), T096 (PIF4 OE) due to geometric-mean dilution shifting from 1/5 to 1/6 activators on Hypocotyl_Length. Net algebraic change: -0.8%. Reverted.

results.reason: Algebraic +0.9% (T010 crossed threshold). ODE and RWR unchanged. Structural PIF7->Hypocotyl edge was tried but reverted after causing 3 new failures.
